title: PocketPlants
subtitle: The best app for your plants
keywords: plants, plant care, plants app, gardening, garden, best plant app, free
description: PocketPlants is an app for plants. We built PocketPlants because we love plants and we think you will love it too. PocketPlants has many great features that will help you with your plants every day. Everyone who tries PocketPlants tells their friends about PocketPlants. Download PocketPlants today and see for yourself.
whatItDoes: Reminds you to water, fertilize and repot each houseplant, with photo-based health tracking.
